gap_notes: No verified machine-readable OpenAPI/Swagger schema yet.
No verified safe public subnet API endpoint yet.

name: HashiChain
notes: Reviewed overlay for SN115 using the live HashiChain source repository. No standalone website, docs site, API, OpenAPI, SSE, or data artifact has been verified yet.

surfaces.name: HashiChain source repository
surfaces.notes: Public HashiChain source repository for SN115.

surfaces.name: HashiChain TaoMarketCap subnet snapshot API
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /public/v1/subnets/115 on api.taomarketcap.com returning machine-readable JSON for SN115 on-chain subnet state, SubnetIdentitiesV3 metadata, economics, and dTAO market fields. HashiChain currently has no separately verified first-party public API; this indexed feed is documented in the TaoMarketCap developer API.

surfaces.name: HashiChain intro logo image
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth PNG brand image published in the official hashi115/hashichain repository assets directory, referenced as the SN115 on-chain subnet logo in SubnetIdentitiesV3, and pinned to an immutable commit.
